items.title: [正面] A few hours in and I love the game already. I beli...
items.summary: A few hours in and I love the game already. I believe what sets this apart from other gacha games for me is that the gameplay is just wonderful. Not just executed brilliantly but tailored to my favorite type of gameplay: card battles. Along with that, you have a heartbreaking story (only chapter 1 is done as of writing) and splendid art. Definitely 10/10 game for me.

items.title: [正面] Wow, this game is a big surprise. Artwork and Musi...
items.summary:
Wow, this game is a big surprise. Artwork and Music are awesome. But wow, there are card games with a good story, this however is a whole other level of an exciting story with great characters. The thrill made me finish chapter 1 in one night. 

I don't get why everything is called a 'slay the spire like', the game has it's own unique system and i like this one much more. Having a group of 4 with 5 fixed cards and one ultimate per character + the realms and modifiers is really refreshing and a lot of fun to play.

Also I had no problems concerning the ChatGPT translation, it works really well. You just need to get used to the use of synonyms. Far from a bad translation actually.

A real hidden gem.

items.title: [正面] Loved the art and music in this game. The new mech...
items.summary: Loved the art and music in this game. The new mechanics add innovation to this Slay the Spire kind of game. Integrated gatcha and more... however, my first playthrough was pretty enjoyable, but when I returned to play after a few days I felt lost, forgot many things and I don´t know if it's something with the menu or the layout, I just didn't feel like playing again. Decks could have more versatility also. It's a good game I hope you enjoy it.

items.summary: 满足我对卡牌游戏的一切幻想

items.title: [正面] 有人知道steam版怎么氪金吗，点击购买即使挂木弟也一直提醒steam网络不行，官网也没有steam...
items.summary:
有人知道steam版怎么氪金吗，点击购买即使挂木弟也一直提醒steam网络不行，官网也没有steam的账号数据。
剧情老套，但画面演出做得确实很好。
支持爆炒抹布哈基米，乱削角色，弱势角色盼加强倒是迟迟不来，神国队作为正统鸡煲传承人启动速度比鸡煲还慢，没有内核加速和汇集缺费缺成傻逼，还不像鸡煲有廉价冷头编冲补抽，有冰球也顶不住怪物逆天的伤害啊。
限定进常驻=绝版也是幽默至极，新角色个个不抽石块就是究极残疾，一些主C还得追超限，哈基米鼠了。
But，玩法既然是杀戮尖塔就不会不好玩，而且可以和莱克daddy繁衍即使是缅北二游我也愿意被卖口牙。

items.title: [正面] 感觉玩着还行，剧情方面挺好的
